items.title: Federalism, Nationalism and Development: India and the Punjab Economy
items.notes: Second edition - Examines the interplay of federalism and nationalism in India, focusing on Punjab's economic development

items.title: Institutional Communalism in India
items.notes: Discusses the role of communalism in Indian institutions and governance structures

items.title: Hindu Bias in India's 'Secular' Constitution: Probing Flaws in the Instruments of Governance
items.notes: Analyzes constitutional law and governance in India, examining secular principles in practice

items.title: Economy, Culture and Human Rights: Turbulence in Punjab, India and Beyond
items.notes: Explores economic development, culture, and human rights issues in Punjab and broader contexts

items.title: Punjabi Identity in a Global Context
items.notes: Co-edited volume addressing Punjabi identity in diaspora and multicultural contexts
